EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} rolled back the {object.value} configuration
The user {subject.name} deleted ARP information for {dst.ip} on the interface "{interface}"
The user {subject.name} changed configuration on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} changed attributes for the user {datafield1}
The user {subject.name} deleted attributes for the user {datafield1}
The user {subject.name} enabled the service "{datafield1}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} changed authentication for root
The user {subject.name} disabled the service "{datafield1}" on host {event_src.host}
